cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about act-of-increasing-llm-context-windows?
cards.back: Performance (generally) seems strong, and they show linear scaling in context length From linear attention to Mamba -2 Let’s generalize linear attention a little bit and add per -position weights..

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about engineering?
cards.back: Qwen 3.5 / Qwen Next The newest qwen are 3-1 GDN / Attention hybrids.

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about potentially?
cards.back: Replace big feedforward with (many) big feedforward networks and a selector layer You can increase the # experts without affecting FLOPs [Fedus et al 2022] Why are MoEs getting popular?

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about operation?
cards.back: Linear attention Consider the usual attention operation..

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about quadratic?
cards.back: 𝑄 ∈ 𝑅𝑛×𝑑𝑘, 𝐾 ∈ 𝑅𝑛×𝑑𝑘, 𝑉 ∈ 𝑅𝑛×𝑑𝑣 𝐴𝑡𝑡𝑛 𝑄, 𝐾, 𝑉 = 𝜌 𝑄𝐾⊤ 𝑉 This is quadratic due to 𝑄𝐾⊤ (𝑛2𝑑𝑘).
